use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct EventPayload {
    data: String,
    priority: u8,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct RawEvent {
    #[serde(rename = "type")]
    event_type: String,
    timestamp: u64,
    payload: EventPayload,
}

// GOOD: deserialize directly into typed struct
fn process_event(json_str: &str) -> Result<Event, Error> {
    let raw: RawEvent = serde_json::from_str(json_str)?;

    Ok(Event {
        event_type: raw.event_type,
        timestamp: raw.timestamp,
        payload: raw.payload,
    })
}

fn handle_stream(messages: &[String]) -> Vec<Event> {
    messages.iter()
        .filter_map(|msg| process_event(msg).ok())
        .collect()
}
